action_mappings.drive: drive truck {} from location {} to location {} within city {}
action_mappings.load: load package {} into truck {} at location {}
action_mappings.unload: unload package {} from truck {} at location {}

action_mappings_indef.drive: drive a truck {} from a location {} to a location {} within a city {}
action_mappings_indef.load: load a package {} into a truck {} at a location {}
action_mappings_indef.unload: unload a package {} from a truck {} at a location {}

drive.description: drive a truck A from a location B to a location C within a city D
preconditions: I can only drive a truck A from a location B to a location C within a city D if it is the case that A is a truck and B is a location and C is a location and D is a city and B is in the city D and C is in the city D and A is at the truck B
effects: Once I drive a truck A from a location B to a location C within a city D, it is the case that A is at the truck C
Once I drive a truck A from a location B to a location C within a city D, it is not the case anymore that A is at the truck B

load.description: load a package A into a truck B at a location C
preconditions: I can only load a package A into a truck B at a location C if it is the case that A is a package and B is a truck and C is a location and A is at C and B is at the truck C
effects: Once I load a package A into a truck B at a location C, it is the case that A is in B
Once I load a package A into a truck B at a location C, it is not the case anymore that A is at C

unload.description: unload a package A from a truck B at a location C
preconditions: I can only unload a package A from a truck B at a location C if it is the case that A is a package and B is a truck and C is a location and A is in B and B is at the truck C
effects: Once I unload a package A from a truck B at a location C, it is the case that A is at C
Once I unload a package A from a truck B at a location C, it is not the case anymore that A is in B

action_nl_templates.drive: drive truck {?t} from location {?from} to location {?to} within city {?c}
action_nl_templates.load: load package {?p} into truck {?t} at location {?l}
action_nl_templates.unload: unload package {?p} from truck {?t} at location {?l}

action_nl_templates_indef.drive: drive a truck {?t} from a location {?from} to a location {?to} within a city {?c}
action_nl_templates_indef.load: load a package {?p} into a truck {?t} at a location {?l}
action_nl_templates_indef.unload: unload a package {?p} from a truck {?t} at a location {?l}
